since_last: 51% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.95% · BTC -2.22% · Gold -0.65% · Nasdaq100 -2.59%. 51% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.99%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.99%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.60%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +5.25%, IBM +5.14%, NET +4.85%, NOW +4.48%, MGNI +4.18%. Laggards: MU -10.60%, LRCX -9.19%, VRT -9.08%, ARM -9.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.25% at $162.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
